name: Fish in Parchment
recipeIngredient: thinly sliced and separated into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F. Place the oven rack in the center of the oven.
2. Brush the salmon fillet with glaze or other seasoning and place it in the center of the parchment paper.
3. Sprinkle lemon juice over the peppers and place them, along with onion slices, around the fish.
4. Wrap the edges of the parchment paper tightly around the fish to prevent steam from escaping.
5. Place the parchment package in an oven-proof pan and bake for 5-8 minutes, until the fish is cooked.
6. Remove the parchment package from the oven and prick it with a sharp knife to release steam.
